evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Du entwickelst und betreust Datenmodelle, Queries und Views im SAP-Umfeld und stellst deren optimale Nutzung sicher
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD centers on maintaining and optimizing existing SAP data models/reports (an implicit quality/reliability signal) with no explicit velocity language, but also no strong rigour vocabulary like 'testing' or 'governance', landing as mixed on balance.
evidence.domain_risk: entwickelst datengetriebene Loesungen zur Unterstuetzung unserer Geschaeftsprozesse
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Manufacturing/FMCG business process reporting (SAP BW/SAC) affects operational decisions but the JD contains no explicit financial-reporting, audit, or regulatory language, so it is generic business-decision risk rather than high.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Du treibst die Weiterentwicklung bestehender BW-Inhalte voran und bindest neue Datenquellen, beispielsweise ueber die Business Data Cloud, an
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role maintains and extends an established, named enterprise stack (SAP BW, BW/4HANA, SAC, Datasphere, Azure Databricks, Power BI) with existing content to build on, indicating a mature, specialized function rather than a greenfield build.
evidence.jd_authorship: Du arbeitest an modernen Analytics-Use-Cases im Azure Databricks Umfeld und entwickelst datengetriebene Loesungen zur Unterstuetzung unserer Geschaeftsprozesse
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name specific tools, systems, and integration points (SAP BW/4HANA, SAC, Azure Databricks, Power BI, IoT/market data) precisely enough to picture the actual day-to-day work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Du integrierst und verknuepfst Daten aus SAP- und Non-SAP-Systemen und schaffst so konsistente, ganzheitliche Datenloesungen
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The focus is on internal data modeling, integration, and reporting infrastructure within the company's own systems, not a named external commercial, product, or finance stakeholder group.
evidence.autonomy_level: Die Unterstuetzung beim Ausbau KI-gestuetzter Analytics-Use-Cases und der Weiterentwicklung unserer Hybrid-Analytics-Strategie gehoeren ebenso zu deinen Aufgaben
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Most verbs are execution-oriented ('betreust', 'verantwortest', 'Unterstuetzung') describing support of an existing strategy rather than defining or owning it independently.
evidence.ai_role: Die Unterstuetzung beim Ausbau KI-gestuetzter Analytics-Use-Cases und der Weiterentwicklung unserer Hybrid-Analytics-Strategie
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to support the expansion of AI-powered analytics use cases as downstream infrastructure work, not to use AI coding tools themselves.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of testing, data quality frameworks, or data contracts appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely around capability delivery (developing, expanding, integrating solutions) with no risk, compliance, or reliability register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Du treibst die Weiterentwicklung bestehender BW-Inhalte voran
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role advances and extends existing BW content and reporting rather than building new infrastructure from zero.
evidence.language_gate: sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse runden dein Profil ab
